learnings.text: D1.3: close_hooks.py uses get_task_by_id() from task_registry - ensure task_registry has test tasks for integration testing. The task creation function create_task() is imported and used in create_followup_task() - verify it accepts parent_task_id parameter.

Meeting folder state: [R] marker is NOT in folder names. State is tracked in manifest.json (status field). find_unprocessed_meetings() should check manifest.json['status'] instead of folder name pattern.

Pattern: gather_thread_context() is the single source of truth for context data. Wrapper scripts (close.py, drop-close.py) should only add presentation-layer flags (like is_action_conversation) for easier LLM consumption. This cleanly separates mechanics from semantics.
